content.thinking: Good, now I can see the CI workflow file. Let me read it to understand the job structure. The job name is "Test (astro): ubuntu-latest (node@22)" so I need to find that job in ci.yml.

content.text: Let me read the CI workflow file:

content.content:
1	name: CI
2	
3	on:
4	  workflow_dispatch:
5	  push:
6	    branches:
7	      - main
8	  merge_group:
9	  pull_request:
10	    paths-ignore:
11	      - ".vscode/**"
12	      - "**/*.md"
13	      - ".github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/**"
14	
15	permissions: {}
16	
17	# Automatically cancel older in-progress jobs on the same branch
18	concurrency:
19	  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.event_name == 'pull_request_target' && github.head_ref || github.ref }}
20	  cancel-in-progress: true
21	defaults:
22	  run:
23	    shell: bash
24	
25	env:
26	  TURBO_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.TURBO_TOKEN }}
27	  TURBO_TEAM: ${{ secrets.TURBO_TEAM }}
28	  FORCE_COLOR: true
29	  ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED: true
30	  # 7 GiB by default on GitHub, setting to 6 GiB
31	  # https://docs.github.com/en/actions/using-github-hosted-runners/about-github-hosted-runners#supported-runners-and-hardware-resources
32	  NODE_OPTIONS: --max-old-space-size=6144
33	
34	jobs:
35	  changes:
36	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
37	    permissions:
38	      pull-requests: read # Required by dorny/paths-filter to read changed files
39	    outputs:
40	      language-tools: ${{ steps.filter.outputs.language-tools }}
41	      astro-types: ${{ steps.filter.outputs.astro-types }}
42	      ci: ${{ steps.filter.outputs.ci }}
43	    steps:
44	      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
45	      - uses: dorny/paths-filter@d1c1ffe0248fe513906c8e24db8ea791d46f8590 # v3.0.3
46	        id: filter
47	        with:
48	          # When updating filters here, make sure to also add or remove them from the outputs block above.
49	          filters: |
50	            language-tools:
51	              - 'packages/language-tools/**'
52	            astro-types:
53	              - 'packages/astro/types/**'
54	              - 'packages/astro/astro-jsx.d.ts'
55	            ci:
56	              - '.github/workflows/ci.yml'
57	
58	  # Build primes out Turbo build cache and pnpm cache
59	  build:
60	    name: "Build: ${{ matrix.os }}"
61	    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
62	    timeout-minutes: 5
63	    permissions:
64	      contents: read # Checkout only
65	    strategy:
66	      matrix:
67	        # windows-latest is still windows-2022 for some reason, even though the windows-2025 image is GA
68	        OS: [ubuntu-latest, windows-2025]
69	        NODE_VERSION: [22]
70	      fail-fast: true
71	    steps:
72	      # Disable crlf so all OS can share the same Turbo cache
73	      # https://github.com/actions/checkout/issues/135
74	      - name: Disable git crlf
75	        run: git config --global core.autocrlf false
76	
77	      - name: Checkout
78	        uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
79	
80	      - name: Setup PNPM
81	        uses: pnpm/action-setup@fc06bc1257f339d1d5d8b3a19a8cae5388b55320 # v4.4.0
82	
83	      - name: Setup node@${{ matrix.NODE_VERSION }}
84	        uses: actions/setup-node@48b55a011bda9f5d6aeb4c2d9c7362e8dae4041e # v6.4.0
85	        with:
86	          node-version: ${{ matrix.NODE_VERSION }}
87	          cache: "pnpm"
88	
89	      - name: Install dependencies
90	        run: pnpm install
91	
92	      # Only build in ubuntu as windows can share the build cache.
93	      # Also only build in core repo as forks don't have access to the Turbo cache.
94	      - name: Build Packages
95	        if: ${{ matrix.os == 'ubuntu-latest' && github.repository_owner == 'withastro' }}
96	        run: pnpm run build
97	        
98	  biome-lint:
99	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
100	    permissions:
101	      contents: read # Checkout only
102	    steps:
103	      - name: Checkout
104	        uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
105	        with:
106	          persist-credentials: false
107	      - name: Setup Biome
108	        uses: biomejs/setup-biome@4c91541eaada48f67d7dbd7833600ce162b68f51 # v2.7.1
109	      - name: Run Biome
110	        run: biome ci --formatter-enabled=false --enforce-assist=false --reporter=default --reporter=github
111	  
112	  lint:
113	    name: Lint
114	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
115	    timeout-minutes: 5
116	    permissions:
117	      contents: read # Checkout only
118	    needs: 
119	      - biome-lint
120	    steps:
121	      - name: Disable git crlf
122	        run: git config --global core.autocrlf false
123	
124	      - name: Checkout
125	        uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
126	
127	      - name: Setup PNPM
128	        uses: pnpm/action-setup@fc06bc1257f339d1d5d8b3a19a8cae5388b55320 # v4.4.0
129	
130	      - name: Setup Node
131	        uses: actions/setup-node@48b55a011bda9f5d6aeb4c2d9c7362e8dae4041e # v6.4.0
132	        with:
133	          node-version: 24.15.0
134	          cache: "pnpm"
135	
136	      - name: Install dependencies
137	        run: pnpm install
138	
139	      - name: Build Packages
140	        # The cache doesn't contain prebuild files and causes knip to fail
141	        run: pnpm run build --force
142	
143	      - name: Lint source code
144	        run: pnpm run lint:ci
145	
146	      - name: Lint publish code
147	        run: pnpm run publint
148	
149	      - name: Type-check files
150	        run: pnpm run typecheck
151	
152	  test:
153	    name: 'Test (${{ matrix.TEST_SUITE.name }}): ${{ matrix.os }} (node@${{ matrix.NODE_VERSION }})'
154	    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
155	    timeout-minutes: 30
156	    permissions:
157	      contents: read # Checkout only
158	    needs: build
159	    strategy:
160	      matrix:
161	        OS: [ubuntu-latest, macos-14, windows-2025]
162	        NODE_VERSION: [22, 24]
163	        TEST_SUITE:
164	          - { name: astro, script: 'pnpm run test:astro' }
165	          - { name: integrations, script: 'pnpm run test:integrations' }
166	        # We only test Node 22 on macOS and Windows to reduce CI usage.
167	        # This exclude config tells GitHub to skip the items in the matrix that run on macOS or
168	        # Windows and use one of the older Node versions.
169	        exclude:
170	          - os: macos-14
171	            NODE_VERSION: 22
172	          - os: windows-2025
173	            NODE_VERSION: 22
174	      fail-fast: false
175	    env:
176	      NODE_VERSION: ${{ matrix.NODE_VERSION }}
177	    steps:
178	      - name: Disable git crlf
179	        run: git config --global core.autocrlf false
180	
181	      - name: Checkout
182	        uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
183	        with:
184	          fetch-depth: 0
185	
186	      - name: Setup PNPM
187	        uses: pnpm/action-setup@fc06bc1257f339d1d5d8b3a19a8cae5388b55320 # v4.4.0
188	
189	      - name: Setup node@${{ matrix.NODE_VERSION }}
190	        uses: actions/setup-node@48b55a011bda9f5d6aeb4c2d9c7362e8dae4041e # v6.4.0
191	        with:
192	          node-version: ${{ matrix.NODE_VERSION }}
193	          cache: "pnpm"
194	
195	      - name: Install dependencies
196	        run: pnpm install
197	
198	      - name: Build Packages
199	        run: pnpm run build
200	
201	      - name: Test ${{ matrix.TEST_SUITE.name }}
202	        run: ${{ matrix.TEST_SUITE.script }}
203	        env:
204	          # By default, Turborepo groups the logs in CI environments to prevent
205	          # the logs from being interleaved. We don't have log interleaving
206	          # issues here because we already passed the `--concurrency=auto` flag
207	          # to `turbo`.
208	          #
209	          # We want to force Turborepo to print the logs ASAP since it will help us
210	          # debug tests that time out, where we can know which step is stuck.
211	          #
212	          # https://github.com/vercel/turborepo/blob/v2.7.6/docs/site/content/docs/reference/run.mdx?plain=1#L361-L378
213	          # https://github.com/vercel/turborepo/blob/v2.7.6/docs/site/content/docs/reference/options-overview.mdx?plain=1#L63
214	          TURBO_LOG_ORDER: stream
215	
216	  test-language-tools:
217	    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
218	    timeout-minutes: 30
219	    permissions:
220	      contents: read # Checkout only
221	    needs:
222	      - changes
223	      - build
224	    if: needs.changes.outputs.language-tools == 'true' || needs.changes.outputs.astro-types == 'true' || needs.changes.outputs.ci == 'true'
225	    strategy:
226	      matrix:
227	        os: [ubuntu-latest]
228	        # VS Code 1.92 (minimum supported version) ships with Node 20.14.0
229	        node_version: [20.14.0, 22]
230	        include:
231	          - os: windows-latest
232	            node_version: 20.14.0
233	          - os: macos-latest
234	            node_version: 20.14.0
235	      fail-fast: false
236	
237	    name: 'Test (language-tools): node-${{ matrix.node_version }}, ${{ matrix.os }}'
238	    steps:
239	      - name: Checkout
240	        uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
241	
242	      - name: Setup PNPM
243	        uses: pnpm/action-setup@fc06bc1257f339d1d5d8b3a19a8cae5388b55320 # v4.4.0
244	
245	      - name: Setup node@${{ matrix.node_version }}
246	        uses: actions/setup-node@48b55a011bda9f5d6aeb4c2d9c7362e8dae4041e # v6.4.0
247	        with:
248	          node-version: ${{ matrix.node_version }}
249	          cache: "pnpm"
250	
251	      - name: Install dependencies
252	        run: pnpm install
253	
254	      - name: Build the packages
255	        run: pnpm build
256	
257	      - name: Test (Linux)
258	        if: runner.os == 'Linux'
259	        # On Linux, VS Code tests require a GUI environment, so we need to run tests using Xvfb
260	        run: |
261	          pnpm run test:language-tools:no-vs
262	          cd packages/language-tools/vscode
263	          xvfb-run -a pnpm test
264	
265	      - name: Test ts-plugin (Linux, flaky)
266	        if: runner.os == 'Linux'
267	        timeout-minutes: 10
268	        working-directory: packages/language-tools/ts-plugin
269	        # TODO: Figure out why the vscode tests are fine, but the ts-plugin ones are super flaky
270	        run: xvfb-run -a pnpm test || echo "::warning title=ts-plugin tests failed::Known flaky; not failing CI."
271	
272	      - name: Test
273	        if: runner.os != 'Linux'
274	        run: pnpm test:language-tools
275	
276	  e2e:
277	    name: "Test (E2E): ${{ matrix.os }} (node@${{ matrix.NODE_VERSION }})"
278	    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
279	    timeout-minutes: 30
280	    permissions:
281	      contents: read # Checkout only
282	    needs: build
283	    strategy:
284	      matrix:
285	        OS: [ubuntu-latest, windows-2025]
286	        NODE_VERSION: [22]
287	      fail-fast: false
288	    env:
289	      NODE_VERSION: ${{ matrix.NODE_VERSION }}
290	    steps:
291	      - name: Disable git crlf
292	        run: git config --global core.autocrlf false
293	
294	      - name: Checkout
295	        uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
296	
297	      - name: Setup PNPM
298	        uses: pnpm/action-setup@fc06bc1257f339d1d5d8b3a19a8cae5388b55320 # v4.4.0
299	
300	      - name: Setup node@${{ matrix.NODE_VERSION }}
301	        uses: actions/setup-node@48b55a011bda9f5d6aeb4c2d9c7362e8dae4041e # v6.4.0
302	        with:
303	          node-version: ${{ matrix.NODE_VERSION }}
304	          cache: "pnpm"
305	
306	      - name: Install dependencies
307	        run: pnpm install
308	
309	      - name: Build Packages
310	        run: pnpm run build
311	
312	      - name: Test
313	        run: pnpm run test:e2e
314	
315	  smoke:
316	    name: "Test (Smoke): ${{ matrix.os }} (node@${{ matrix.NODE_VERSION }})"
317	    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
318	    timeout-minutes: 30
319	    permissions:
320	      contents: read # Checkout only
321	    needs: build
322	    strategy:
323	      matrix:
324	        OS: [ubuntu-latest, windows-2025]
325	        NODE_VERSION: [22]
326	    env:
327	      NODE_VERSION: ${{ matrix.NODE_VERSION }}
328	    steps:
329	      - name: Disable git crlf
330	        run: git config --global core.autocrlf false
331	
332	      - name: Checkout
333	        uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
334	
335	      - name: Setup PNPM
336	        uses: pnpm/action-setup@fc06bc1257f339d1d5d8b3a19a8cae5388b55320 # v4.4.0
337	
338	      - name: Setup node@${{ matrix.NODE_VERSION }}
339	        uses: actions/setup-node@48b55a011bda9f5d6aeb4c2d9c7362e8dae4041e # v6.4.0
340	        with:
341	          node-version: ${{ matrix.NODE_VERSION }}
342	          cache: "pnpm"
343	
344	      - name: Checkout docs
345	        uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
346	        with:
347	          repository: withastro/docs
348	          path: smoke/docs
349	          # For a commit event on the `next` branch (`ref_name`), use the `v6` branch.
350	          # For a pull_request event merging into the `next` branch (`base_ref`), use the `v6` branch.
351	          # NOTE: For a pull_request event, the `ref_name` is something like `<pr-number>/merge` than the branch name.
352	          # NOTE: Perhaps docs repo should use a consistent `next` branch in the future.
353	          ref: ${{ (github.ref_name == 'next' || github.base_ref == 'next') && 'v6' || 'main' }}
354	
355	      - name: Install dependencies
356	        run: pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile
357	
358	      # Reset lockfile changes so that Turbo can reuse the old build cache
359	      - name: Reset lockfile changes
360	        run: git reset --hard
361	
362	      - name: Build Packages
363	        run: pnpm run build
364	
365	      - name: Remove docs translations except for English and Korean
366	        run: find smoke/docs/src/content/docs ! -name 'en' ! -name 'ko' -type d -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -exec rm -rf {} +
367	
368	      - name: Check if docs changed
369	        id: changes
370	        uses: dorny/paths-filter@d1c1ffe0248fe513906c8e24db8ea791d46f8590 # v3.0.3
371	        with:
372	          filters: |
373	            docs:
374	              - 'packages/integrations/*/README.md'
375	              - "packages/astro/src/types/public/**"
376	              - 'packages/astro/src/core/errors/errors-data.ts'
377	
378	      - name: Build autogenerated docs pages from current astro branch
379	        if: ${{ steps.changes.outputs.docs == 'true' }}
380	        run: cd smoke/docs && pnpm docgen && pnpm docgen:errors
381	        env:
382	          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
383	          SOURCE_REPO: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.repo.full_name || github.event.repository.full_name }}
384	          SOURCE_BRANCH: ${{ github.head_ref || github.ref_name }}
385	
386	      - name: Test
387	        run: pnpm run test:smoke
388	        env:
389	          SKIP_OG: true
390	          PUBLIC_TWO_LANG: true
391

file.content:
name: CI

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  merge_group:
  pull_request:
    paths-ignore:
      - ".vscode/**"
      - "**/*.md"
      - ".github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/**"

permissions: {}

# Automatically cancel older in-progress jobs on the same branch
concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.event_name == 'pull_request_target' && github.head_ref || github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true
defaults:
  run:
    shell: bash

env:
  TURBO_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.TURBO_TOKEN }}
  TURBO_TEAM: ${{ secrets.TURBO_TEAM }}
  FORCE_COLOR: true
  ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED: true
  # 7 GiB by default on GitHub, setting to 6 GiB
  # https://docs.github.com/en/actions/using-github-hosted-runners/about-github-hosted-runners#supported-runners-and-hardware-resources
  NODE_OPTIONS: --max-old-space-size=6144

jobs:
  changes:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      pull-requests: read # Required by dorny/paths-filter to read changed files
    outputs:
      language-tools: ${{ steps.filter.outputs.language-tools }}
      astro-types: ${{ steps.filter.outputs.astro-types }}
      ci: ${{ steps.filter.outputs.ci }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
      - uses: dorny/paths-filter@d1c1ffe0248fe513906c8e24db8ea791d46f8590 # v3.0.3
        id: filter
        with:
          # When updating filters here, make sure to also add or remove them from the outputs block above.
          filters: |
            language-tools:
              - 'packages/language-tools/**'
            astro-types:
              - 'packages/astro/types/**'
              - 'packages/astro/astro-jsx.d.ts'
            ci:
              - '.github/workflows/ci.yml'

  # Build primes out Turbo build cache and pnpm cache
  build:
    name: "Build: ${{ matrix.os }}"
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    timeout-minutes: 5
    permissions:
      contents: read # Checkout only
    strategy:
      matrix:
        # windows-latest is still windows-2022 for some reason, even though the windows-2025 image is GA
        OS: [ubuntu-latest, windows-2025]
        NODE_VERSION: [22]
      fail-fast: true
    steps:
      # Disable crlf so all OS can share the same Turbo cache
      # https://github.com/actions/checkout/issues/135
      - name: Disable git crlf
        run: git config --global core.autocrlf false

      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2

      - name: Setup PNPM
        uses: pnpm/action-setup@fc06bc1257f339d1d5d8b3a19a8cae5388b55320 # v4.4.0

      - name: Setup node@${{ matrix.NODE_VERSION }}
        uses: actions/setup-node@48b55a011bda9f5d6aeb4c2d9c7362e8dae4041e # v6.4.0
        with:
          node-version: ${{ matrix.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: "pnpm"

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pnpm install

      # Only build in ubuntu as windows can share the build cache.
      # Also only build in core repo as forks don't have access to the Turbo cache.
      - name: Build Packages
        if: ${{ matrix.os == 'ubuntu-latest' && github.repository_owner == 'withastro' }}
        run: pnpm run build
        
  biome-lint:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read # Checkout only
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
        with:
          persist-credentials: false
      - name: Setup Biome
        uses: biomejs/setup-biome@4c91541eaada48f67d7dbd7833600ce162b68f51 # v2.7.1
      - name: Run Biome
        run: biome ci --formatter-enabled=false --enforce-assist=false --reporter=default --reporter=github
  
  lint:
    name: Lint
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 5
    permissions:
      contents: read # Checkout only
    needs: 
      - biome-lint
    steps:
      - name: Disable git crlf
        run: git config --global core.autocrlf false

      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2

      - name: Setup PNPM
        uses: pnpm/action-setup@fc06bc1257f339d1d5d8b3a19a8cae5388b55320 # v4.4.0

      - name: Setup Node
        uses: actions/setup-node@48b55a011bda9f5d6aeb4c2d9c7362e8dae4041e # v6.4.0
        with:
          node-version: 24.15.0
          cache: "pnpm"

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pnpm install

      - name: Build Packages
        # The cache doesn't contain prebuild files and causes knip to fail
        run: pnpm run build --force

      - name: Lint source code
        run: pnpm run lint:ci

      - name: Lint publish code
        run: pnpm run publint

      - name: Type-check files
        run: pnpm run typecheck

  test:
    name: 'Test (${{ matrix.TEST_SUITE.name }}): ${{ matrix.os }} (node@${{ matrix.NODE_VERSION }})'
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    timeout-minutes: 30
    permissions:
      contents: read # Checkout only
    needs: build
    strategy:
      matrix:
        OS: [ubuntu-latest, macos-14, windows-2025]
        NODE_VERSION: [22, 24]
        TEST_SUITE:
          - { name: astro, script: 'pnpm run test:astro' }
          - { name: integrations, script: 'pnpm run test:integrations' }
        # We only test Node 22 on macOS and Windows to reduce CI usage.
        # This exclude config tells GitHub to skip the items in the matrix that run on macOS or
        # Windows and use one of the older Node versions.
        exclude:
          - os: macos-14
            NODE_VERSION: 22
          - os: windows-2025
            NODE_VERSION: 22
      fail-fast: false
    env:
      NODE_VERSION: ${{ matrix.NODE_VERSION }}
    steps:
      - name: Disable git crlf
        run: git config --global core.autocrlf false

      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Setup PNPM
        uses: pnpm/action-setup@fc06bc1257f339d1d5d8b3a19a8cae5388b55320 # v4.4.0

      - name: Setup node@${{ matrix.NODE_VERSION }}
        uses: actions/setup-node@48b55a011bda9f5d6aeb4c2d9c7362e8dae4041e # v6.4.0
        with:
          node-version: ${{ matrix.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: "pnpm"

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pnpm install

      - name: Build Packages
        run: pnpm run build

      - name: Test ${{ matrix.TEST_SUITE.name }}
        run: ${{ matrix.TEST_SUITE.script }}
        env:
          # By default, Turborepo groups the logs in CI environments to prevent
          # the logs from being interleaved. We don't have log interleaving
          # issues here because we already passed the `--concurrency=auto` flag
          # to `turbo`.
          #
          # We want to force Turborepo to print the logs ASAP since it will help us
          # debug tests that time out, where we can know which step is stuck.
          #
          # https://github.com/vercel/turborepo/blob/v2.7.6/docs/site/content/docs/reference/run.mdx?plain=1#L361-L378
          # https://github.com/vercel/turborepo/blob/v2.7.6/docs/site/content/docs/reference/options-overview.mdx?plain=1#L63
          TURBO_LOG_ORDER: stream

  test-language-tools:
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    timeout-minutes: 30
    permissions:
      contents: read # Checkout only
    needs:
      - changes
      - build
    if: needs.changes.outputs.language-tools == 'true' || needs.changes.outputs.astro-types == 'true' || needs.changes.outputs.ci == 'true'
    strategy:
      matrix:
        os: [ubuntu-latest]
        # VS Code 1.92 (minimum supported version) ships with Node 20.14.0
        node_version: [20.14.0, 22]
        include:
          - os: windows-latest
            node_version: 20.14.0
          - os: macos-latest
            node_version: 20.14.0
      fail-fast: false

    name: 'Test (language-tools): node-${{ matrix.node_version }}, ${{ matrix.os }}'
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2

      - name: Setup PNPM
        uses: pnpm/action-setup@fc06bc1257f339d1d5d8b3a19a8cae5388b55320 # v4.4.0

      - name: Setup node@${{ matrix.node_version }}
        uses: actions/setup-node@48b55a011bda9f5d6aeb4c2d9c7362e8dae4041e # v6.4.0
        with:
          node-version: ${{ matrix.node_version }}
          cache: "pnpm"

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pnpm install

      - name: Build the packages
        run: pnpm build

      - name: Test (Linux)
        if: runner.os == 'Linux'
        # On Linux, VS Code tests require a GUI environment, so we need to run tests using Xvfb
        run: |
          pnpm run test:language-tools:no-vs
          cd packages/language-tools/vscode
          xvfb-run -a pnpm test

      - name: Test ts-plugin (Linux, flaky)
        if: runner.os == 'Linux'
        timeout-minutes: 10
        working-directory: packages/language-tools/ts-plugin
        # TODO: Figure out why the vscode tests are fine, but the ts-plugin ones are super flaky
        run: xvfb-run -a pnpm test || echo "::warning title=ts-plugin tests failed::Known flaky; not failing CI."

      - name: Test
        if: runner.os != 'Linux'
        run: pnpm test:language-tools

  e2e:
    name: "Test (E2E): ${{ matrix.os }} (node@${{ matrix.NODE_VERSION }})"
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    timeout-minutes: 30
    permissions:
      contents: read # Checkout only
    needs: build
    strategy:
      matrix:
        OS: [ubuntu-latest, windows-2025]
        NODE_VERSION: [22]
      fail-fast: false
    env:
      NODE_VERSION: ${{ matrix.NODE_VERSION }}
    steps:
      - name: Disable git crlf
        run: git config --global core.autocrlf false

      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2

      - name: Setup PNPM
        uses: pnpm/action-setup@fc06bc1257f339d1d5d8b3a19a8cae5388b55320 # v4.4.0

      - name: Setup node@${{ matrix.NODE_VERSION }}
        uses: actions/setup-node@48b55a011bda9f5d6aeb4c2d9c7362e8dae4041e # v6.4.0
        with:
          node-version: ${{ matrix.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: "pnpm"

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pnpm install

      - name: Build Packages
        run: pnpm run build

      - name: Test
        run: pnpm run test:e2e

  smoke:
    name: "Test (Smoke): ${{ matrix.os }} (node@${{ matrix.NODE_VERSION }})"
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    timeout-minutes: 30
    permissions:
      contents: read # Checkout only
    needs: build
    strategy:
      matrix:
        OS: [ubuntu-latest, windows-2025]
        NODE_VERSION: [22]
    env:
      NODE_VERSION: ${{ matrix.NODE_VERSION }}
    steps:
      - name: Disable git crlf
        run: git config --global core.autocrlf false

      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2

      - name: Setup PNPM
        uses: pnpm/action-setup@fc06bc1257f339d1d5d8b3a19a8cae5388b55320 # v4.4.0

      - name: Setup node@${{ matrix.NODE_VERSION }}
        uses: actions/setup-node@48b55a011bda9f5d6aeb4c2d9c7362e8dae4041e # v6.4.0
        with:
          node-version: ${{ matrix.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: "pnpm"

      - name: Checkout docs
        uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
        with:
          repository: withastro/docs
          path: smoke/docs
          # For a commit event on the `next` branch (`ref_name`), use the `v6` branch.
          # For a pull_request event merging into the `next` branch (`base_ref`), use the `v6` branch.
          # NOTE: For a pull_request event, the `ref_name` is something like `<pr-number>/merge` than the branch name.
          # NOTE: Perhaps docs repo should use a consistent `next` branch in the future.
          ref: ${{ (github.ref_name == 'next' || github.base_ref == 'next') && 'v6' || 'main' }}

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile

      # Reset lockfile changes so that Turbo can reuse the old build cache
      - name: Reset lockfile changes
        run: git reset --hard

      - name: Build Packages
        run: pnpm run build

      - name: Remove docs translations except for English and Korean
        run: find smoke/docs/src/content/docs ! -name 'en' ! -name 'ko' -type d -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -exec rm -rf {} +

      - name: Check if docs changed
        id: changes
        uses: dorny/paths-filter@d1c1ffe0248fe513906c8e24db8ea791d46f8590 # v3.0.3
        with:
          filters: |
            docs:
              - 'packages/integrations/*/README.md'
              - "packages/astro/src/types/public/**"
              - 'packages/astro/src/core/errors/errors-data.ts'

      - name: Build autogenerated docs pages from current astro branch
        if: ${{ steps.changes.outputs.docs == 'true' }}
        run: cd smoke/docs && pnpm docgen && pnpm docgen:errors
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          SOURCE_REPO: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.repo.full_name || github.event.repository.full_name }}
          SOURCE_BRANCH: ${{ github.head_ref || github.ref_name }}

      - name: Test
        run: pnpm run test:smoke
        env:
          SKIP_OG: true
          PUBLIC_TWO_LANG: true

**PHASE 2: Writing Dockerfile and run.sh**

input.content:
FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    git \
    curl \
    ca-certificates \
    xvfb \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Node 22 via NodeSource
RUN curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash - && \
    apt-get install -y nodejs && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install pnpm
RUN npm install -g pnpm

WORKDIR /app

COPY repo/ /app/

# Install dependencies
RUN pnpm install

# Build packages
RUN pnpm run build

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -e

cd /app

# Disable git crlf
git config --global core.autocrlf false

# Install dependencies
pnpm install

# Build packages
pnpm run build

# Run the astro test suite
pnpm run test:astro

echo "FINAL_STATUS = SUCCESS"
